objective: Add ten coherent authored human identities and balance the canonical library without palette swaps, demographic geometry inference, or unequal backend quality.
editorial_rules: Heritage and cultural metadata never select facial or body geometry.
Every face, silhouette, hair or covering, body, garment, accessory, and device combination is authored as one coherent identity.
No member may be a recolor, costume swap, or device swap of an existing member.
Minor-coded H02 and H03 require explicit owner approval before public release.
Assistive devices are functional rig components and require device-specific review.
All members receive equal expression, motion, framing, 2.5D, and GLB quality.
Suggestion balancing rotates authored identities uniformly and never predicts a user's race or ethnicity.

planned_members.identity_direction: Latino pre-teen boy with warm medium complexion, short loose curls, and an energetic hoodie silhouette
